title: The Forgotten Anniversary
content: Oliver suddenly realized he had forgotten his anniversary with Sophia. Feeling terrible, he rushed to buy her favorite flowers and a small chocolate cake. When he arrived at her apartment, he apologized before she could say anything. Sophia smiled and admitted she had forgotten the date too because she had been so busy at work. They laughed together and decided that spending the evening together was more important than remembering the exact day. Sometimes, love is measured by forgiveness, not by perfect memories.
